title: Crepinia dumalis
taxonomy: Crepinia dumalis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It belongs to the genus Crepinia, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. Within the Asparagaceae family, Crepinia dumalis is placed in the subfamily Agavoideae. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other members of the Asparagaceae family. The classification of Crepinia dumalis provides a framework for understanding its biology and ecology.

Its roots and leaves are often used in herbal remedies to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. More studies are required to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential benefits of Crepinia dumalis.
